interactionEntry.trigger: User submits the checkout form by activating the 'Place order' button.
interactionEntry.description: The button enters its loading state and the form fields become read-only. The system validates the payment details and submits the order to the server.

interactionEntry.trigger: The server returns a 422 response because the billing address is incomplete.
interactionEntry.description: The form exits its loading state. The offending field is marked invalid, an inline error message appears beneath it, and focus moves to the first invalid field so screen reader users hear the error.
The user corrects the billing address and re-submits. The system re-validates, accepts the order, and the button returns to its loading state.
The system navigates to the confirmation page and announces the success message via a live region.

items.trigger: User activates the 'Add to cart' button on a product card.
items.description: The item is added to the cart. The cart badge increments and a brief confirmation toast appears.
The drawer slides in from the right, focus moves to the first interactive element inside it, and the rest of the page is marked inert.
The user reviews the line items and proceeds to checkout. The drawer closes and the checkout view receives focus.
